top_signals.title: US Refiners Get Rare Chance to Buy Iranian Crude Again
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration has temporarily eased some sanctions on Iranian oil, pausing hostilities that have defined US-Iran relations since the 1979 hostage crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 'We'll see' — Trump hedges on guarantee Iran won't use oil profits to rebuild military
top_signals.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent authorized the import of Iranian oil and refined products into the U.S. through at least August.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vimeo Parent Bending Spoons, Backers Seek $1.62 Billion in IPO
top_signals.summary: Bending Spoons SpA, which acquires struggling software businesses, and some of its backers are seeking to raise as much as $1.62 billion in an initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold price back above $4,200 on US-Iran deal progress
top_signals.summary: "Energy prices will remain a key short-term driver for the precious metal space," analyst says.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Australian sugar producer works to restore operations as ransomware group claims attack
top_signals.summary: Mackay Sugar said it was "working urgently" to verify claims that a highly active ransomware group was behind a cyberattack that shut down harvesting and milling operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Schick Razor Maker Is Said to Reject Unsolicited Takeover Offer
top_signals.summary: Edgewell Personal Care Co., which makes Schick razors, has rejected an unsolicited takeover offer from private equity firm Yellow Wood Partners, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Very concerned’: City watchdog scolds motor finance lenders over £9bn redress scheme
top_signals.summary: The City watchdog has warned motor finance lenders it is “very concerned” with how prepared the industry is to implement its £9bn redress scheme, City AM can reveal.  The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) fired out letters to over 100 firms last Friday following a review of the sector’s plans to implement its under-fire redress program. [...]

top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Air Force One begins commissioning flights, final step before presidential use
top_signals.summary: The service announced the delivery of the Qatari-donated aircraft to Joint Base Andrews on Friday and the kickoff of its commissioning flights.
